data.title: Record Week: Bitcoin ETFs Net $2.5 Billion In Inflows, Ethereum ETFs Took In $1.2 Billion
data.description: Digital asset investment products saw their highest-ever weekly inflows last week, totaling $3.85 billion, smashing the prior record set just weeks ago.

Merck Reveals Mixed Data From Keytruda/Lynparza Regime In Ovarian Cancer
data.description: Merck's ovarian cancer trial met its primary endpoint, while lymphoma trial data set the Phase 3 dose for zilovertamab vedotin at 1.75 mg/kg.

data.title: Talkspace Transitions To Payor Network, Bolsters Revenue: Analyst
data.description: Talkspace is expected to generate revenue growth and margin expansion. Analyst rates TALK as Overweight with $4.50 target.
